column.name: name_en
column.value: Association for Democratic Reforms (ADR)

column.name: name_hi
column.value: एसोसिएशन फॉर डेमोक्रेटिक रिफॉर्म्स (ADR)

column.name: description_en
column.value: ADR (Association for Democratic Reforms) is a non-partisan, non-governmental organisation working on electoral and political reforms in India for over 25 years. It publishes affidavit-based analysis of MPs, MLAs, criminal cases, and wealth declarations at adrindia.org.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: ADR एक गैर-पक्षपाती, गैर-सरकारी संगठन है जो 25 वर्षों से भारत में चुनावी और राजनीतिक सुधारों पर काम कर रहा है।

column.name: title_en
column.value: ADR: Criminal Cases Against India's Politicians — Facts from Affidavits

column.name: title_hi
column.value: ADR: भारतीय राजनेताओं के खिलाफ आपराधिक मामले — शपथपत्रों के तथ्य

column.name: summary_en
column.value: Association for Democratic Reforms (ADR) presents data from election affidavits showing the extent of criminal cases declared by candidates. Source: ADR India, Election Commission affidavits.

column.name: summary_hi
column.value: ADR ने चुनावी शपथपत्रों से जुटाए आंकड़े पेश किए जो उम्मीदवारों द्वारा घोषित आपराधिक मामलों की सीमा दर्शाते हैं।

column.name: title_en
column.value: What really happens inside Parliament — A citizen's guide to Lok Sabha sessions

column.name: title_hi
column.value: संसद के अंदर वाकई क्या होता है — लोकसभा सत्रों पर एक नागरिक मार्गदर्शिका

column.name: summary_en
column.value: Most citizens never know when Parliament sessions begin, what is discussed inside, or which decisions actually change things on the ground. This reel explains the basics of how Parliament works.

column.name: summary_hi
column.value: अधिकांश नागरिक नहीं जानते कि संसद सत्र कब शुरू होते हैं, अंदर क्या चर्चा होती है, और कौन से निर्णय वास्तव में जमीनी स्तर पर बदलाव लाते हैं।

column.name: name
column.value: ADR India — Reports and Press Releases

column.name: name
column.value: PRS India — Parliament Vital Stats

column.name: feed_source_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM rss_feed_sources WHERE name='ADR India — Reports and Press Releases' LIMIT 1)

column.name: title
column.value: Analysis of Criminal Background, Financial, Education, Gender Details of Candidates — LS Elections 2024 (Phase 1–7)

column.name: description
column.value: Consolidated ADR analysis of criminal, financial, educational, and gender backgrounds of candidates across all seven phases of the 2024 Lok Sabha elections. Includes asset comparison for re-contesting MPs.

column.name: author
column.value: ADR India

column.name: source_name
column.value: ADR India

column.name: feed_source_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM rss_feed_sources WHERE name='ADR India — Reports and Press Releases' LIMIT 1)

column.name: title
column.value: Analysis of Criminal Background, Financial, Education, Gender Details of Winners — LS 2024

column.name: description
column.value: ADR's comprehensive analysis of criminal, financial, educational, and gender backgrounds of winning candidates from the 2024 Lok Sabha elections. Informs the public about profiles and assets of newly elected Parliament members.

column.name: author
column.value: ADR India

column.name: source_name
column.value: ADR India

column.name: feed_source_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM rss_feed_sources WHERE name='ADR India — Reports and Press Releases' LIMIT 1)

column.name: title
column.value: Analysis of Vote Share, Margin of Victory and Representativeness of Winners — LS 2024

column.name: description
column.value: ADR analysis of 2024 Lok Sabha results focusing on winners' vote shares, margins of victory, and representativeness relative to total registered electorate. Compares results to 2019 general elections by party.

column.name: author
column.value: ADR India

column.name: source_name
column.value: ADR India

column.name: feed_source_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM rss_feed_sources WHERE name='ADR India — Reports and Press Releases' LIMIT 1)

column.name: title
column.value: Analysis of Criminal, Financial, and Other Background Details of Union Council of Ministers — 18th Lok Sabha

column.name: description
column.value: Detailed ADR analysis of criminal, financial, and educational backgrounds of 71 ministers in the 18th Lok Sabha Cabinet. 99% of analyzed ministers are crorepatis; nearly 40% have declared criminal cases against them.

column.name: author
column.value: ADR India

column.name: source_name
column.value: ADR India

column.name: feed_source_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM rss_feed_sources WHERE name='ADR India — Reports and Press Releases' LIMIT 1)

column.name: title
column.value: Discrepancies Between Votes Cast and Votes Counted in the 2024 Lok Sabha Election

column.name: description
column.value: ADR analysis of discrepancies between votes polled and votes counted across parliamentary constituencies in the 2024 Lok Sabha elections. Highlights constituencies with differences in both directions.

column.name: author
column.value: ADR India

column.name: source_name
column.value: ADR India
